overview: The Department of Innovation and Entrepreneurship was established in 2015 with the vision of creating a sustainable entrepreneurial ecosystem in the country driven by the innovation and creativity of local entrepreneurs. Its mission is to create young leaders in the society who will be able to solve the social problems or fulfill the needs and wants of their targeted people. It aims at providing a platform to develop relevant entrepreneurial skills through practical assignment and project work and elevating the growth of new business through continuous support. Moreover, to become successful entrepreneurs or job holders, the department provides all support to the students such as mentoring, funding, co-working space, industry network and practical focused course curriculum.
waiver_info:
Waiver based waiver (Bachelor's) - Waiver on SGPA (Semester result)
+ Female quota
+ Need-based
+ Quota
+ Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota
+ Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota
+ Waiver for DIU alumni
+ Group admission quota
+ Freedom fighter quota
+ And many more.
eligibility:
Minimum GPA 2.5 both in SSC/HSC/Diploma or equivalent background from any group (Science/ Commerce/Arts/Madrasa)
* Students of English medium background are encouraged to apply for admission.
career_opportunities: You can become an Entrepreneur (start your own business)
You can get job in National Companies (like Bank, Telecom, RMG, Pharma, Leather, Textile, new startups and etc.)
You can get jobs multinational companies (MNCs) like bkash, Cement, Texaco, etc.
You can get government jobs (All kind of Govt. jobs including BCS)
